heading: Manufacture, sale, or possession within specific jurisdictions; penalty
label: 1243 Manufacture, sale, or possession within specific jurisdictions; penalty
text: Whoever, within any Territory or possession of the United States, within Indian country (as defined in ), or within the special maritime and territorial jurisdiction of the United States (as defined in ), manufactures, sells, or possesses any switchblade knife, shall be fined not more than $2,000 or imprisoned not more than five years, or both.section 1151 of title 18section 7 of title 18
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the sixtieth day after , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 12, 1958section 6 of Pub. L. 85–623section 1241 of this title
